summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ScanSavvy static website. All core functionality and requirements verified successfully.
passed_tests: Logo displays correctly in header next to ScanSavvy title
Favicon configured properly with logo image
Logo file exists and loads from /assets/scansavvy-logo.png
index.html loads correctly with all CSS and JavaScript
Navigation links work correctly (Features, How It Works, Pricing)
Responsive design works on mobile viewport (390x844)
All sections visible (Hero, Features, How It Works, Pricing, CTA, Footer)
Mobile navigation properly hides on small screens
Hero section stacks vertically on mobile
Logo has proper alt text for accessibility
CSS styles load and apply correctly
JavaScript functions load and execute properly
